_meta.note: Frozen Figma variable defs for the Checkbox page node. NOTE: two label specs coexist — loop/checkbox/label (16/18) and legacy Checkbox/label (14/14); the loop/* set is the WBG one.

variables..UI Component/Checkbox/Label: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: loop/checkbox/label/font Size, weight: loop/checkbox/label/font weight, lineHeight: loop/checkbox/label/line height, letterSpacing: loop/checkbox/label/letter spacing)
variables..UI Component/Input/Label/Label: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: SemiBold, size: loop/label/font size, weight: loop/label/font weight, lineHeight: loop/label/font height, letterSpacing: loop/label/letter spacing)
variables..UI Component/Input/Label/Helper: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: loop/label/helper text font size, weight: 400, lineHeight: 1, letterSpacing: 0.5)
